requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Nicaragua PV Inverter Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——尼加拉瓜光伏逆变器项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——尼加拉瓜光伏逆變器項目驗收

summary.en: For Nicaragua grid-tied PV projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the most appropriate international safety evidence for PV inverter power conversion equipment unless a project-specific NTON/DGCN, MEM/INE, ENATREL, distributor, lender, or owner specification identifies another accepted route. IEC 62109-1 covers general safety requirements for power converters in photovoltaic systems, while IEC 62109-2 covers particular inverter requirements. Safety evidence should cover the exact model or model family, input/output ratings, environmental ratings, protective devices, firmware-relevant safety functions, Spanish-language warnings and installation instructions, and the Nicaraguan 60 Hz grid configuration intended for use.
summary.zh: 对于尼加拉瓜并网光伏项目，除非项目专属NTON/DGCN、MEM/INE、ENATREL、配电公司、贷款方或业主规格指定其他可接受路径，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏逆变器功率变换设备最适用的国际安全证据。IEC 62109-1涵盖光伏系统用功率变换器通用安全要求，IEC 62109-2涵盖逆变器特殊要求。安全证据应覆盖准确型号或型号系列、输入/输出额定值、环境额定值、保护器件、与固件相关的安全功能、西班牙语警示和安装说明，以及拟使用的尼加拉瓜60 Hz电网配置。
summary.zht: 對於尼加拉瓜併網光伏項目，除非項目專屬NTON/DGCN、MEM/INE、ENATREL、配電公司、貸款方或業主規格指定其他可接受路徑，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏逆變器功率轉換設備最適用的國際安全證據。IEC 62109-1涵蓋光伏系統用功率轉換器通用安全要求，IEC 62109-2涵蓋逆變器特殊要求。安全證據應覆蓋準確型號或型號系列、輸入/輸出額定值、環境額定值、保護器件、與韌體相關的安全功能、西班牙語警示和安裝說明，以及擬使用的尼加拉瓜60 Hz電網配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Nicaraguan NTON/DGCN conformity context where a national technical standard or project specification requires it
MEM / INE / ENATREL / distributor project requirements where applicable

summary.en: China's common PV inverter safety and performance file is based on GB/T 37408 and related domestic certification scheme requirements. GB/T 37408 includes safety and marking provisions and may be supported by CNAS laboratory reports. It is not, by itself, an IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificate and should not be treated as automatic evidence for Nicaragua unless the test report explicitly demonstrates IEC 62109 coverage for the same model family and configuration.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器安全和性能文件基于GB/T 37408及相关国内认证方案要求。GB/T 37408包含安全和标识规定，并可能由CNAS实验室报告支持。但其本身并非IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书；除非测试报告明确证明同一型号系列和配置覆盖IEC 62109，否则不应作为尼加拉瓜自动接受的证据。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器安全和性能文件基於GB/T 37408及相關國內認證方案要求。GB/T 37408包含安全和標識規定，並可能由CNAS實驗室報告支持。但其本身並非IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書；除非測試報告明確證明同一型號系列和配置覆蓋IEC 62109，否則不應作為尼加拉瓜自動接受的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: a Chinese GB/T 37408 certificate does not automatically satisfy IEC 62109 safety expectations for a Nicaragua PV project. Exporters should obtain or compile IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports from an accredited laboratory for the exact inverter model or family, confirm enclosure and environmental ratings for the installation site, supply Spanish-language safety documentation, and ensure the safety file aligns with the 60 Hz firmware and grid-connection configuration submitted for MEM/INE, ENATREL, distributor, or project-owner review.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408证书不会自动满足尼加拉瓜光伏项目对IEC 62109安全证据的预期。出口商应为准确逆变器型号或系列取得或整理来自认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书和报告，确认外壳及环境额定值适合安装地点，提供西班牙语安全文件，并确保安全资料与提交给MEM/INE、ENATREL、配电公司或项目业主审查的60 Hz固件和并网配置一致。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408證書不會自動滿足尼加拉瓜光伏項目對IEC 62109安全證據的預期。出口商應為準確逆變器型號或系列取得或整理來自認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書和報告，確認外殼及環境額定值適合安裝地點，提供西班牙語安全文件，並確保安全資料與提交給MEM/INE、ENATREL、配電公司或項目業主審查的60 Hz韌體和併網配置一致。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice for bankable grid-tied PV procurement, NTON/DGCN conformity paths, and MEM/INE or ENATREL/distributor review where IEC evidence is requested
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme dependent under China GB/T inverter certification; not a Nicaragua IEC 62109 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A PV inverter with only Chinese GB/T 37408 evidence should not be treated as Nicaragua-ready IEC 62109 evidence. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 model-family safety reports, Spanish installation and warning documentation, and a consistency check against the 60 Hz / 120-240 V configuration used for Nicaragua interconnection review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408证据的光伏逆变器，不应视为已具备尼加拉瓜项目可接受的IEC 62109证据。应准备IEC 62109-1/-2型号系列安全报告、西班牙语安装和警示文件，并核对其与尼加拉瓜并网审查所用60 Hz / 120-240 V配置的一致性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408證據的光伏逆變器，不應視為已具備尼加拉瓜項目可接受的IEC 62109證據。應準備IEC 62109-1/-2型號系列安全報告、西班牙語安裝和警示文件，並核對其與尼加拉瓜併網審查所用60 Hz / 120-240 V配置的一致性。
